title: paraspalathus micrantha
intro: Paraspalathus micrantha, also known as the Dwarf Star Grass, is a low-growing, succulent plant native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and infections. The health benefits of Paraspalathus micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of a salve or cream.
